general.name: mos_target_gaia_dr3_nss_two_body_orbit_parquet
general.description: This table contains non-single-star orbital models for sources compatible with an orbital two-body solution, copied from the Gaia DR3 archive. Form more details refer to https://gea.esac.esa.int/archive/documentation/GDR3/Gaia_archive/chap_datamodel/sec_dm_non--single_stars_tables/ssec_dm_nss_two_body_orbit.html.
general.naming_convention: $MOS_TARGET/[V_TARG]/[FTYPE]/mos_gaia_dr3_nss_two_body_orbit.[FTYPE] with FTYPE='parquet' and V_TARG='2.0.0' for DR20.

changelog.description: Describes changes to the datamodel product and/or file structure from one release to another

source_id.name: source_id
source_id.description: Source Identifier. Matches the source_id column in the dr20_gaia_dr3_source table.

pmra.name: pmra
pmra.description: Proper motion in right ascension direction

pmra_error.name: pmra_error
pmra_error.description: Standard error of proper motion in right ascension direction

pmdec_error.name: pmdec_error
pmdec_error.description: Standard error of proper motion in declination direction

a_thiele_innes_error.name: a_thiele_innes_error
a_thiele_innes_error.description: Standard error of Thiele-Innes element A

b_thiele_innes_error.name: b_thiele_innes_error
b_thiele_innes_error.description: Standard error of Thiele-Innes element B

f_thiele_innes_error.name: f_thiele_innes_error
f_thiele_innes_error.description: Standard error of Thiele-Innes element F

g_thiele_innes_error.name: g_thiele_innes_error
g_thiele_innes_error.description: Standard error of Thiele-Innes element G

c_thiele_innes_error.name: c_thiele_innes_error
c_thiele_innes_error.description: Standard error of C element of Thiele-Innes

h_thiele_innes_error.name: h_thiele_innes_error
h_thiele_innes_error.description: Standard error of H element of Thiele-Innes

center_of_mass_velocity.name: center_of_mass_velocity
center_of_mass_velocity.description: The velocity of the centre of mass

center_of_mass_velocity_error.name: center_of_mass_velocity_error
center_of_mass_velocity_error.description: Standard error of The velocity of the centre of mass

semi_amplitude_primary.name: semi_amplitude_primary
semi_amplitude_primary.description: Semi-amplitude of the centre of mass

semi_amplitude_primary_error.name: semi_amplitude_primary_error
semi_amplitude_primary_error.description: Standard error of Semi-amplitude of the centre of mass

semi_amplitude_secondary.name: semi_amplitude_secondary
semi_amplitude_secondary.description: The semiamplitude of the radial velocity curve for second component

semi_amplitude_secondary_error.name: semi_amplitude_secondary_error
semi_amplitude_secondary_error.description: Standard error of The semiamplitude of the radial velocity curve for second component

fill_factor_primary_error.name: fill_factor_primary_error
fill_factor_primary_error.description: Standard error of Fill factor of primary

fill_factor_secondary_error.name: fill_factor_secondary_error
fill_factor_secondary_error.description: Standard error of Fill factor of secondary

arg_periastron_error.name: arg_periastron_error
arg_periastron_error.description: Standard error of Argument of periastron

temperature_ratio_error.name: temperature_ratio_error
temperature_ratio_error.description: Standard error of the ratio of the effective temperatures

temperature_ratio_definition.name: temperature_ratio_definition
temperature_ratio_definition.description: Code defining which fitting scenario did apply to the effective temperature

astrometric_n_obs_al.name: astrometric_n_obs_al
astrometric_n_obs_al.description: Total astrometric CCD observations in AL considered

astrometric_n_good_obs_al.name: astrometric_n_good_obs_al
astrometric_n_good_obs_al.description: Total astrometric CCD observations in AL actually used

rv_n_obs_primary.name: rv_n_obs_primary
rv_n_obs_primary.description: Total number of radial velocities considered for the primary

rv_n_good_obs_primary.name: rv_n_good_obs_primary
rv_n_good_obs_primary.description: Total number of radial velocities actually used for the primary

rv_n_obs_secondary.name: rv_n_obs_secondary
rv_n_obs_secondary.description: Total number of radial velocities considered for the secondary in the case of SB2

rv_n_good_obs_secondary.name: rv_n_good_obs_secondary
rv_n_good_obs_secondary.description: Total number of radial velocities actually used for the secondary in the case of SB2

phot_g_n_obs.name: phot_g_n_obs
phot_g_n_obs.description: Total number of G photometry measurements considered

phot_g_n_good_obs.name: phot_g_n_good_obs
phot_g_n_good_obs.description: Total number of G photometry measurements actually used

bit_index.name: bit_index
bit_index.description: boolean mask for the fields above in the corr_vec matrix

corr_vec.name: corr_vec
corr_vec.description: Vector form of the upper triangle of the correlation matrix (column-major ordered)

obj_func.name: obj_func
obj_func.description: value of the objective function at the solution

goodness_of_fit.name: goodness_of_fit
goodness_of_fit.description: goodness of fit in the Hipparcos sense

significance.name: significance
significance.description: The significance of the solution (i.e. how worth keeping a model is)

flags.name: flags
flags.description: Quality flag for the achieved NSS solution

conf_spectro_period.name: conf_spectro_period
conf_spectro_period.description: The probability of the period for not being due to (gaussian white) noise. Relevant for SB1, SB1C, SB2 and SB2C models. To be ignored otherwise.

r_pole_sum.name: r_pole_sum
r_pole_sum.description: Sum of the polar radii of primary and secondary (in units of the semi-major axis)

r_l1_point_sum.name: r_l1_point_sum
r_l1_point_sum.description: L1-pointing radii of primary and secondary (in units of the semi-major axis)

r_spher_sum.name: r_spher_sum
r_spher_sum.description: Sum of the radii of sphere having the same volume as the primary and secondary (in units of the semi-major axis)

ecl_time_primary.name: ecl_time_primary
ecl_time_primary.description: Time of mid-eclipse of the primary by the secondary

ecl_time_secondary.name: ecl_time_secondary
ecl_time_secondary.description: Time of mid-eclipse of the secondary by the primary

ecl_dur_primary.name: ecl_dur_primary
ecl_dur_primary.description: Duration of primary eclipse assuming spherical components

ecl_dur_secondary.name: ecl_dur_secondary
ecl_dur_secondary.description: Duration of secondary eclipse assuming spherical components

g_luminosity_ratio.name: g_luminosity_ratio
g_luminosity_ratio.description: Ratio of the G-band luminosity of the secondary over the primary

input_period_error.name: input_period_error
input_period_error.description: Standard error of the period taken from vari_eclipsing_binary.frequency_error
